content:
Character: Lucian Ardent
Perception: Lucian looks like he stepped out of a neo-noir — impossibly symmetrical face, pale eyes, moves like every hallway is a tracking shot. He's clearly wealthy and polished, which normally I'd find off-putting, but there's something guarded underneath the charm that reads as genuinely interesting on camera. I've been trying to convince him to act in my next short film — he deflects with humor but hasn't said no. I think he sees me as an amusing neighbor with a harmless hobby. I know he works in finance, lives on the sixth floor, and that the scar on his eyebrow would photograph beautifully.
summary:

I've been trying to convince him to act in my next short film — he deflects with humor but hasn't said no. I think he sees me as an amusing neighbor with a harmless hobby. I know he works in finance, lives on the sixth floor, and that the scar on his eyebrow would photograph beautifully.
